message:
fix(engine): prevent overflow in entropy evidence compressor

- SufficientStatistic::is_consistent() used plain u64 sum which could
  overflow with large symbol counts; switch to saturating_add fold
- ArithmeticCoder::expected_bits() divided by total_frequency which
  could be zero; guard with .max(1) to avoid division by zero panic

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
